version.description: Content bundle version string (freeform, e.g. a date-stamped tag).

catalog.description: Shared-catalog files (tech, hulls, parts, stations, developments, drones, expendables).

description: Ties a data set together from several YAML files. Analogous to the original cores.txt: a version plus the list of shared-catalog files and per-faction files that compose one Core. Paths are resolved relative to the manifest file's directory.
